themeWords.meaning: to praise, boast, celebrate; to shine forth

sentenceTheme: All creation is called to praise God everywhere and with every instrument, even with every breath.

verses.text: Praise ye the LORD. Praise God in his sanctuary: praise him in the firmament of his power.

highlightedWords.meaning: an expanse, firmament; the vault of the sky

verses.text: Praise him for his mighty acts: praise him according to his excellent greatness.

highlightedWords.meaning: to praise, boast, celebrate; to shine forth

verses.text: Praise him with the sound of the trumpet: praise him with the psaltery and harp.
Praise him with the timbrel and dance: praise him with stringed instruments and organs.

highlightedWords.meaning: a dance; dancing (often a round dance)

verses.text: Praise him upon the loud cymbals: praise him upon the high sounding cymbals.

highlightedWords.meaning: to praise, boast, celebrate; to shine forth

verses.text: Let every thing that hath breath praise the LORD. Praise ye the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: to praise, boast, celebrate; to shine forth
